---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who does it help?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you choose this one?

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or other relevant information.

## Phase

Which roadmap phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Phase 1 — Foundation
- [ ] Phase 2 — Views & Search
- [ ] Phase 3 — Collaboration
- [ ] Phase 4 — Extensibility
- [ ] Phase 5 — Intelligence Layer
